title: Suggest changes
info: Type in the changes you wish to bring to the location. These will then be processed by an administrator.
suggestionEditInfo: Make changes to your suggestions. Reset the values by clicking on the links located below each one of your changes
submitError: The suggestion could not be sent. Please retry in a few moments
loadError: The form could not be loaded. Please reload the page.
completeTitle: Thanks! Your suggestion has been submitted.
completeText: A moderator will process it shortly. You can update it any time by coming back to the associated event page.
